creator: douglas.thrift@rightscale.com
text:
My intent was for mod_wsgi 2.X to also have the PKGNAMESUFFIX= 2 as well
since mod_wsgi 2.X is really the legacy mod_wsgi and 3 is the current
recommended version. Could you add that change as well?

Thanks!
-- 
Douglas Thrift
RightScale - Linux Systems Engineer
